programme.title: Ozark Law
programme.desc: One hundred thousand roaring motorcycles roll into the Lake of the Ozarks region for the seminal event of the season; the Lake Ozark and Osage Beach Police Departments must team up with the State Troopers.

programme.title: Ozark Law
programme.desc: Corp. Caleb Harvey stops a driver he suspects has meth; Officer Karl Glascock must rescue a young man who has driven a car into a ditch to avoid deer; Corp. Stephen Riner arrests a grandmother whose record prohibits her from driving.

programme.title: Ozark Law
programme.desc: As summer rolls on, the police officers try to keep the Lake of the Ozarks community safe; Detective Sergeant Mark Kordula gets called to the aid of a bloodied and concussed bar patron lying in the road.

programme.title: Ozark Law
programme.desc: Over 125,000 motorcycles roll into the Lake for the seminal event of the summer, Bike Fest, bringing with them high-octane chaos for the cops in charge, including an onslaught of outlaw biker gangs, messy motorcycle wrecks and boozy partiers.

programme.title: Ozark Law
programme.desc: As cigarette boats battle for speed supremacy on the lake, Chief Boren and Officers Glascock and Khachi meet a bar patron who insists she's done nothing wrong; Officer Jonathan Rosenburg confronts revelers on a party boat.

programme.title: Ozark Law
programme.desc: The Fourth of July at the Lake of the Ozarks begins as Chief Boren and officers confront an unruly bar patron; Officer Kale Keagy stops a suspected drunken driver on the highway.

programme.title: Ozark Law
programme.desc: The new summer at Lake of the Ozarks kicks off with a Memorial Day weekend of "star-spangled awesome" as officers battle barroom brawlers and hotboxing drivers.

programme.title: Ozark Law
programme.desc: The Hot Summer Nights classic car show rolls into town for a day of fun, but things turn really hot that night when there is an outbreak of bar fights; Officer Rosenberg picks up a pair of underage shoplifters and gives them a valuable life lesson.

programme.title: Ozark Law
programme.desc: Crowds flock to the Lake of the Ozarks for the annual Aquapalooza Music Festival during the day; at night, Detective Sgt. Mark Kordula and Chief Boren face underage drinkers using fake IDs to enter bars.

programme.title: Ozark Law
programme.desc: It's midsummer on the Lake, and the action is heating up as officers combat chaos on the roads and boozy bedlam in the bars.

programme.title: Ozark Law
programme.desc: Officers tackle a range of thrilling calls, including a search for a wanted man hiding in a house, a horrific traffic accident on the Bagnell Dam and a vicious fight on the Strip.

programme.title: Ozark Law
programme.desc: The Offshore Speedboat Races descend on the Lake of the Ozarks and chaos ensues as officers respond to a near-drowning, an intoxicated boater, and a couple carrying a locked safe possibly packed with narcotics.

programme.title: Ozark Law
programme.desc: It's a full moon and things are wild at the Lake of the Ozark as officers contend with unruly bar patrons, shots fired, massive dogs, and motor vehicle accidents.
